item.title: Invisibility Shield
item.description: The closer you look, the stranger it gets

item.title: Flies can't fly in low pressure
item.description: A simple science experiment explores how low pressure affects a fly’s ability to fly, using physics to explain the result.

media:content.media:title: Flies can't fly in low pressure
media:content.media:description: A simple science experiment explores how low pressure affects a fly’s ability to fly, using physics to explain the result.

item.title: How extreme darkness changes light
item.description: See how extreme darkness changes the way light behaves

item.title: Schrödinger's fly and quantum mechanics
item.description: I perform a real life Schrödinger's cat experiment with a fly

media:content.media:title: Schrödinger's fly and quantum mechanics

item.title: Oxygen fires are insane!
item.description: I light tubes on fire that are flowing oxygen gas

media:content.media:description: I light tubes on fire that are flowing oxygen gas

item.title: Braking with a bug in the car
item.description: A simple physics experiment looks at what happens when a car brakes suddenly with a bug inside.

media:content.media:title: Braking with a bug in the car
media:content.media:description: A simple physics experiment looks at what happens when a car brakes suddenly with a bug inside.

item.title: Flesh-eating chemical dissolves chicken
item.description: I show you amide and ester hydrolysis

item.title: Can liquid nitrogen run a steam engine?
item.description: In this video I show you what happens to a steam engine in a vacuum chamber and when you put liquid nitrogen in the engine!

media:content.media:title: Can liquid nitrogen run a steam engine?
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you what happens to a steam engine in a vacuum chamber and when you put liquid nitrogen in the engine!

item.title: Is mass always conserved?
item.description: I show you how mass is always conserved, except when it isn't...

item.title: Cutting glass with scissors
item.description: I show you how to cut glass with scissors

item.title: A venus flytrap ate my finger
item.description: A Venus flytrap closes around a finger in a safe experiment, showing how the plant’s trap works.

media:content.media:title: A venus flytrap ate my finger
media:content.media:description: A Venus flytrap closes around a finger in a safe experiment, showing how the plant’s trap works.
